transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for calling Willowbrook Care Navigation. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need to reschedule my appointment with Dr. Ferris. I had one for next Tuesday.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Of course. I can get you right in with Dr. Ferris this Thursday at 2:15 PM instead. Does that work?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Oh, that's fast. Is she actually available then? I thought she was booked solid this week.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Yes, she just had a cancellation, so that slot opened up specifically for you.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Okay, great, let's do Thursday at 2:15 then.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Perfect, you're confirmed for Thursday at 2:15 PM with Dr. Ferris at the Main Street office.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Wait, will I need a referral again, or does the old one still count?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Your existing referral will still be valid, no action needed on your part.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Alright, sounds good. Thanks for squeezing me in.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome. We'll see you Thursday at 2:15. Have a great day.
